title: quickrestart
description: Restarts your game with the click of a button
body:
**This will not be updated anymore in modern launcher. This mod does not work; it just never starts after shutting down. It's not that I don't want to maintain it; it's just that this is almost impossible in modern launchers.**

**A simple mod that restarts your game when you press F12 (which can be changed in the key bind options to whatever key you like). It will ask you to confirm the restart; after that, it will close the game and then instantly start the game again. This can take some time, depending on how good your PC is.**
